cards.name: Ⅶ The Chariot
cards.interpretation: success, ambition, determination, willpower, control, self-discipline, focus

cards.name: 2 of Cups, reversed
cards.interpretation: separation, rejection, division, imbalance, tension, bad communication, withdrawal

cards.name: Ⅹ Wheel of Fortune, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad luck, lack of control, clinging to control, unwelcome changes, delays
